series_metadata.series_description: Information used to give OPOTA-recognized equivalency to instructor-level courses from outside agencies. Includes application for determination of course equivalency, example certificate that they would provide to student, list of instructors with resumes, lesson plan or OPOTA lesson plan, determination letter.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: After obsolete, superceded or replaced ; Electronic: After obsolete, superceded or replaced, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
